Title: User logs in using Google credentials
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Accesso con Google".
2. Enter valid Google email and password.
3. Click "Sign In".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Homepage.

Title: User fails to log in due to invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Accesso con Google".
2. Enter invalid Google email and password.
3. Click "Sign In".
Expected Result: Authentication failure message displayed.

Title: User navigates from Homepage to Personal Area
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the Homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Area personale" from Homepage.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Personal Area.

Title: User navigates from Personal Area to History
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Personal Area.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Storico" from Personal Area.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the History page.

Title: User navigates from Personal Area to Help
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Personal Area.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Aiuto" from Personal Area.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Help section.

Title: User scans a QR code successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Personal Area.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Dettagli passeggeri".
2. Scan a valid QR code.
3. Click "Inserimento dati".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Data Input page.

Title: User fails to scan a QR code
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Personal Area.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Dettagli passeggeri".
2. Scan an invalid QR code.
3. Click "Inserimento dati".
Expected Result: Error message indicating QR code scan failure.

Title: User initiates a payment
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Utilizzo section.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Pagamento".
2. Select a valid payment method and enter the amount.
3. Confirm the payment.
Expected Result: Payment initiated successfully and user is redirected to the Homepage.

Title: User fails to initiate a payment due to invalid payment method
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Utilizzo section.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Pagamento".
2. Select an invalid payment method and enter the amount.
3. Confirm the payment.
Expected Result: Payment failure message displayed.

Title: User views their history
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Personal Area.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Storico" from Personal Area.
Expected Result: User is shown their transaction history.

Title: User enters valid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Inserimento dati section.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid data.
2. Confirm the data entry.
Expected Result: Data entered successfully and user is redirected to the Utilizzo section.

Title: User enters invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the Inserimento dati section.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid data.
2. Attempt to confirm the data entry.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid data.

Title: User follows the main navigation flow
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "Storico".
3. From the Personal Area, click on "Aiuto".
4. From the Personal Area, click on "modifica dati personali".
Expected Result: User navigates through the specified sections without errors.

Title: User follows the alternative navigation flow
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "Segnalazione".
Expected Result: User navigates to the reporting section without errors.

Title: User follows the modification flow
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "modifica dati personali".
Expected Result: User is able to modify their personal data without errors.

Title: User follows the history flow
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "Storico".
Expected Result: User is able to view their transaction history without errors.

Title: User follows the help flow
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "Aiuto".
Expected Result: User is able to access the help section without errors.

Title: User follows the personal area flow
Test Steps: 1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
Expected Result: User is able to navigate through all sections of the personal area without errors.

Title: User follows the main navigation flow with invalid selection
Test Steps:
1. From the Homepage, click on "Area personale".
2. From the Personal Area, click on "Segnalazione".
3. From the Personal Area, click on "modifica dati personali".
4. From the Personal Area, click on "Storico".
Expected Result: User is redirected back to the previous section after attempting to select an invalid option.
